# Student Dashboard

Use this page as the family launch point for student writing. Each link should point to a specific Google Doc that already belongs to that student and book.

The links below are placeholders. After the Google Docs are created, replace each `GOOGLE_DOC_ID` with the real document ID.

## Emma

| Book | Response Packet | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Aesop's Fables | [Open Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_AESOP_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| Alice's Adventures in Wonderland | [Open Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_ALICE_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| Treasure Island | [Open Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_TREASURE_ISLAND_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| Little Women | [Open Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_LITTLE_WOMEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| The Secret Garden | [Open Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Ready |
| The Wind in the Willows | [Open Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_WIND_WILLOWS_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |

## James

| Book | Response Packet | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Aesop's Fables | [Open James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_AESOP_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| Alice's Adventures in Wonderland | [Open James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_ALICE_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| Treasure Island | [Open James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_TREASURE_ISLAND_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| Little Women | [Open James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_LITTLE_WOMEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |
| The Secret Garden | [Open James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Ready |
| The Wind in the Willows | [Open James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_WIND_WILLOWS_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) | Not started |

## Parent Review Queue

Use this section when a student finishes an assignment and needs review.

| Student | Book | Assignment | Review Link | Parent Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Emma | The Secret Garden | Before-and-after description | [Review Emma's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/EMMA_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) |  |
| James | The Secret Garden | Garden plan project report | [Review James's packet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/JAMES_SECRET_GARDEN_GOOGLE_DOC_ID/edit) |  |

## Link Rules

- Student links should go to existing documents with `/edit`, not `/copy`.
- Template links should live only on the parent workflow page.
- Finished assignments should be dated inside the packet so the same document can hold a whole book's worth of work.
